title: مفرد مثنى جمع
instruction_ar: حوّل الكلمة من المفرد إلى المثنى إلى الجمع
instruction_en: Transform the word from singular to dual to plural
notes: Worksheet has no explicit printed instruction line; instruction_ar is an inferred gloss of the singular→dual→plural exercise (flag for owner's mother to confirm wording). Structure: pages 1-5 are picture cards showing one/two/many of each object (no text); page 6 = singular word bank (مفرد), page 7 = dual word bank (مثنى), page 8 = plural word bank (جمع). Page 8 (plural) image is low-resolution; plural forms transcribed by matching column position across pages and by standard MSA plurals — verify especially: قَنانِيُّ (qanini), بَطاريق, مَقالِم, مَساطِر. The columns read right-to-left in 4 columns (8+8+8+3 = 27 triples). صوص (chick) / صيصان is colloquial; mother may prefer كَتْكوت/كَتاكيت. Vowel diacritics on duals/plurals partly inferred where the small image was unclear.
